subject: tomorrow...
body:
Hello Jeffrey!  The doctor's office I have my appt at tomorrow does not
open until 9:15am...I don't want to sit around here until 9:15 only to
be told I can't change my appointment time.  How about I come in at 8:30
and stay till 11:45...I need to be on the 12:05 train home to make my
appt...that way at least I can be there for you for some of the
day...!!!
 
I hope you are doing well and had a good weekend@!
 
Lesley
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
body_html:

I hope you are doing well and had a good weekend@!
 
Lesley
